limitedSupport: This provider may not be fully supported. Capabilities (tools, vision, audio) are not auto-detected - add models manually and configure capabilities per model.
mlxExperimental: MLX support is experimental. Embeddings are unavailable, the reasoning toggle is not yet wired through, and some newer model architectures may fail to load. Report issues on GitHub so we can prioritize them.
refreshModelsError: Provider must have base URL and at least one API key configured to fetch models.
noNewModels: No new models found. All available models are already added.
refreshModelsFailed: Failed to fetch models from {{provider}}. Please check your API key and base URL.
embeddingModelsDesc: Used for RAG and vector search. The selected model becomes the default when generating embeddings.
importedTooltip: Imported from a local file. Removing it from Jan will not delete the file on disk.
noModelFoundDesc: Available models will be listed here. If you don't have any models yet, visit the Hub to download.
noModelFoundRemoteDesc: Available models will be listed here. Use the refresh button above to fetch models from the provider, or add one manually with the + button.

addModel.title: Add New Model
addModel.description: Add a new model to the {{provider}} provider.
addModel.modelExistsDesc: Please choose a different model ID.

deleteModel.title: Delete Model: {{modelId}}
deleteModel.description: Are you sure you want to delete this model? This action cannot be undone.
deleteModel.importedDescription: Remove this imported model from Jan? Your local file on disk will not be deleted.

deleteAllModels.title: Delete all downloaded models?
deleteAllModels.description: This will permanently remove {{count}} model(s) from disk.
deleteAllModels.importedExcluded: {{count}} imported model(s) will be kept (their files were not downloaded by Jan).
deleteAllModels.partialFailure: Failed to delete {{count}} model(s). See console for details.

deleteProvider.title: Delete Provider
deleteProvider.description: Delete this provider and all its models. This action cannot be undone.
deleteProvider.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.

editModel.title: Edit Model: {{modelId}}
editModel.description: Configure model capabilities by toggling the options below.

warning.title: Proceed with Caution
warning.description: Modifying model capabilities may affect performance and functionality. Incorrect settings could cause unexpected behavior or errors.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Enter your API key. You can add extra keys in Advanced, and Jan will try the next one automatically if a key fails.
apiKeys.testHint: Checks /models with each key and shows per-key status.
apiKeys.oneKeyHint: Optional fallback keys are configured in Advanced.

xaiOAuth.title: SuperGrok sign-in
xaiOAuth.description: Sign in with your X / SuperGrok subscription instead of an API key. Jan stores OAuth tokens locally and refreshes them automatically.
xaiOAuth.manualCallbackHint: Jan cannot listen on 127.0.0.1:56121 in this build, so xAI will show an authorization code instead of redirecting back automatically.
xaiOAuth.pasteCodeHelp: After you approve access in the browser, copy the authorization code from the xAI page (or the full callback URL) and paste it here. Do not refresh Jan before submitting.
xaiOAuth.authCodePlaceholder: Paste authorization code or callback URL
xaiOAuth.deviceCode: Enter code {{code}} on the xAI authorization page.
xaiOAuth.desktopOnly: SuperGrok OAuth is available in the Jan desktop app.
